case_title: LILY GROVE VS. KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,371.52 FILED BY GROVE, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-05-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PLAINTIFF GROVE, LILY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GROVE, LILY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
